runners.formComment: Missed the frame latest (20.06) when fifth over 340m at Bulli in a Grade 5. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and two minors. Looks suited and should go close.

runners.formComment: Latest effort finished 7th in a Grade 5 on April 10 over 401m at Richmond behind Gravel Dust beaten 11 lengths (23.75). Look for improvement. Not out of it.

runners.formComment: Working her way into winning form after her success on March 19 at this track over 365m. Last start was fifth over 520m in 30.75, behind She's A Trunkey. Must be included.

runners.formComment: Backs up after winning easily by 5.5 lengths at this track (20.63) beating Just Flick 'Em in a Grade 5 on April 9 four days ago. Likely to find this a lot tougher and he needs to find another gear.
